root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ),1,3)as age , trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no )) ||' ('|| sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ||')' as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name ( sc_lon_m_contract.member_group_no ) as group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as share_stock , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_request_amount ) as loan_request_amount_thai , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount
, (select nvl(total_old_loan + total_oldint,0) from sc_lon_m_loan_request where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as old_loan
, (select real_recieve from sc_lon_m_loan_request where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as real_recieve
, (select balance_salary from sc_lon_m_loan_request where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as balance_salary
, (select salary_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as salary_amount
, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description , '!begining_of_contract_1!' as from_date , '!begining_of_contract_2!' as to_date , ((sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.company_square * sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.land_company)+sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.house_company)as sum_land_house_value , (sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.land_coop * sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.land_square * sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.land_rate) as loan_land_amount , (sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.house_coop * sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.house_square * sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.house_rate) as loan_building_amount , ((select salary_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) * 0.95) as share_95 from sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj , sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise , sc_lon_req_coll_law_head where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code and sc_lon_req_coll_law_appraise.doc_no = sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.doc_no and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = '60' --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '01 ก.พ. 2023' and '28 ก.พ. 2023' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no
